subject: Embargo — Highlight launch, exec quote + access?
snippet: Hi Dani — confirming I'm holding the Highlight launch under embargo until Jun 9. Could I get a quote from Sergei (or you) on why now, plus early product access so the piece isn't just a press release? Tight on my end.

subject: New lab results are available
snippet: Your recent lab results have been posted to your patient portal. Sign in to MyChart to review them and any notes from your care team.

sensitive.reason: Personal medical notification (lab results) that landed in the same inbox Live Context captures — private health context, not work.

subject: Thanks for today + next steps
snippet: Dani — really enjoyed that. The category-creation problem is exactly the kind of thing I want to sink my teeth into. Sketched a couple of launch-narrative directions on the walk home, happy to share if useful. Would love to keep talking.

subject: Re: Thanks for today + next steps
snippet: Likewise — you articulated in 30 minutes what we've been circling for a week. Sarah will reach out with onsite slots for next week. Yes please send the directions, I'll read them tonight.

subject: Quick ask — launch testimonial?
snippet: Theo — your team's been on the team-features design partner program a few weeks now. Would you be open to a short testimonial we could use at launch (Jun 9)? Even 2 sentences on the coordination-tax problem would mean a lot.

subject: Your receipt from Cursor
snippet: Receipt for Cursor Pro — $20.00. Thanks for your business.
_note: No-reply billing. Low-signal — included so the brief can demonstrate filtering noise.

subject: Re: Quick ask — launch testimonial?
snippet: Happy to. Honestly the morning brief alone cut our standup in half — we stopped re-explaining status to each other. I'll write you something clean by Friday. Want me to keep it to the team-coordination angle?

subject: Launch narrative — two directions
snippet: As promised. Direction A leads with the brief artifact ('see your day before it starts'). Direction B leads with the coordination angle for teams. I lean A for a consumer launch, B for the team waitlist. Curious which way you're leaning.

subject: Re: Embargo — Highlight launch, exec quote + access?
snippet: Priya — quote from Sergei you can use: 'AI's limits at work aren't about intelligence anymore, they're a coordination problem. We built the layer that already knows what to do, so work moves forward instead of getting reassembled every morning.' Sending you access creds separately. Embargo Jun 9 confirmed.

subject: Re: Thanks for today + next steps
snippet: Read both directions — A is right for Jun 9, and it matches where the team landed this morning ('briefs you, then moves your work forward'). Let's get you in the room. Sarah's sending onsite times today. Hoping you can meet the team before launch.

subject: Looking forward to our chat at 11
snippet: Hi Dani — looking forward to connecting at 11 about the Head of AI role. I've been thinking about reliability for proactive systems specifically; happy to go deep on eval strategy if that's useful for where you are pre-launch.
